Usage: postman collection [options] [command]

Run and test your Postman collections directly from the command line.

Options:
  -h, --help                         display help for command

Commands:
  migrate [options] <path>           Migrate a v2.1 collection to the v3 format
  lint [options] <path>              Run linting on a local v3 collection at
                                     the given file or directory path.
  run [options] <collectionId/Path>  Initiate a Postman collection run from a
                                     given ID or path.
